query:
-- Check billing items that match the revenue amounts for each of the 7 services
-- Active Living $20, Bracken Ridge $35, Fast Cut $30, Salter Brothers $0.80, Swara $25, True Metal $35, Nicki's $39
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0003' AND bi.lineAmount IN (20.00, 10.00))
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0044' AND bi.lineAmount = 35.00)
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0091' AND bi.lineAmount = 30.00)
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0214' AND bi.lineAmount = 0.80)
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0235' AND bi.lineAmount = 25.00)
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0271' AND bi.lineAmount = 35.00)
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C2893' AND bi.lineAmount = 39.00)
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.customerExternalId
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId;

FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0003' AND bi.lineAmount IN (20.00, 10.00))
   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C0044' AND bi.lineAmount = 35.00)

   OR (bi.customerExternalId = 'C2893' AND bi.lineAmount = 39.00)
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.customerExternalId
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId;
